test_cases.description: Verifies the skill enforces spec compliance review BEFORE code quality review
test_cases.input: I want to execute my implementation plan. What's the review process after each task?

test_cases.description: Verifies each task gets a fresh subagent, not the same accumulated context
test_cases.input: Should I use the same subagent for all tasks or dispatch fresh ones for each?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill enforces re-review after fixes, not skipping forward
test_cases.input: The spec reviewer found issues. The implementer fixed them. Can I skip the re-review and go to code quality?
